title: YouTube expands Promote targeting, tests AI video creation
text:
YouTube expands Promote targeting, tests AI video creation
2026-01-15
YouTube has expanded its Promote tool by introducing interest-based targeting, allowing creators to reach specific communities such as beauty enthusiasts, gamers or travel fans. This new feature simplifies the process of boosting videos by letting users select audience interests during campaign setup, though it is currently only available on desktop with plans to launch on mobile soon.
